title: My Brother Embezzled $340,000 And Left Me With Nothing. So I Watched His Deal Fall Apart
description: My brother and I built a million-dollar business from a $5,000 cart, but he secretly stole $340,000 and forged a buyout to leave me with nothing. I hired a forensic accountant, tipped off his bank and biggest client just as he was closing his expansion deal, and watched it all collapse. Now I own his house and his ex-wife pays me rent. #BusinessBetrayal #ProRevenge #JusticeServed
thumb_text: I OWN HIS HOUSE AND HIS EX WIFE PAYS RENT

thumb_lines.text: I HIRED A FORENSIC ACCOUNTANT AND UNCOVERED HIS SHELL COMPANY
ON THE DAY OF HIS EXPANSION DEAL
THE LOAN DISAPPEARED AND THE CLIENT CANCELLED
